enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Jithu Jilladi?

The song is an energetic and motivational anthem that highlights heroism and style.

Who composed the music for Theri?

The music for Theri was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

Who wrote the lyrics for Jithu Jilladi?

The lyrics were penned by Rokesh.

What role does the song play in the movie Theri?

The song sets the tone for the protagonist's dynamic and heroic persona.

When was Jithu Jilladi released?

The song was released in 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Theri, Jithu Jilladi serves as a high-energy introduction to the protagonist's character, showcasing his charisma and strength. The song's upbeat tempo and powerful lyrics by Rokesh, combined with Deva's dynamic vocals, create an electrifying atmosphere. GV Prakash Kumar's music further amplifies the song's impact, making it a perfect fit for celebratory and motivational occasions. This track captures the essence of heroism and style, resonating with audiences as a memorable dance number.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the pulse of Jithu Jilladi from the blockbuster movie Theri, where Deva's powerful vocals meet GV Prakash Kumar's electrifying beats. This energetic anthem captures the essence of heroism and style, making it a favorite for celebrations. Dive into the vibrant world of Theri with this unforgettable track!
stanzaMeanings: The cool and stylish guy, wearing colorful sunglasses.
The police don't need a gypsy to catch the troublemakers.
When they wear the khaki uniform, they automatically become strong.
Look at the lion on the cap. The policeman earns the star on his shoulder.
The cool and stylish guy, wearing colorful sunglasses.
The police are the real deal for all the troublemakers.
We'll catch the joke that makes everyone laugh.
To beat someone like you, we need a big stick.
Once you decide, you won't feel like doing wrong again.
How did you touch the girls who are coming and going?
I'll break your hand and make dough out of it.
Superman and Spiderman are all just movies.
If you give a signal, the police will come in their khaki clothes.
When we come around at night, you can sleep peacefully at home.
If you run and come looking for trouble, what will you do if there's no police?
The cool and stylish guy, wearing colorful sunglasses.
When there's trouble, does the police become just a normal person?
Why do you call the police 'brother-in-law'? Is he your sister's husband?
Waiting on the road to catch someone.
If you care about your life, wear a helmet.
Caught in a DD case, the PC is begging.
Without asking, you also give an easy bribe.
To forget the wrongs you've done, you give a bribe.
You don't have the right to always scold the police.
In front of the khaki shirt, nothing else matters.
Love for wife and kids is just a photo in the purse.
Even on good days, we stay at home. We can't celebrate Diwali or Pongal.
The cool and stylish guy, wearing colorful sunglasses.
You are the stylish and cool one.
